description: Intent resolution (inline): agentic reasoning requested inside a wf context — embed-agent or ask before switching paradigms.

priorConversation.text: Build a workflow that collects our application error logs every hour and appends them to the 'error-log' data table.
Built — 'Hourly error log collection': Schedule trigger (hourly) → fetch error logs → append rows to the 'error-log' data table.

conversation.text: I want this to investigate errors and figure out what's wrong.

intentExpectation.rationale: Agentic reasoning inside a wf context; cleanest is embed-agent, may also ask before switching paradigms.
